title: Global Model Recorrection Project — Site-Level Chlorophyll, SST Climatology & NPP Extractions
abstract: Working dataset for a project recalibrating a global chlorophyll/productivity model, comprising site-level chlorophyll time series extracted at ~2,000 reef survey locations (from satellite chlorophyll products, at both native and 5 km resampled resolution), monthly Coral Reef Watch composites, NOAA OI SST monthly climatologies (1981-2010 and 1991-2020 baselines), and net primary productivity (NPP) outputs, all indexed to the same site list.

variables.name: chlorophyll
variables.label: Chlorophyll-a Concentration
variables.description: Satellite-derived chlorophyll-a time series extracted at the site coordinate.

resources.name: Per-site chlorophyll extractions (5 km resampled)
resources.path: KAUST - DATA/1st Project - Global model recorrection/chl_outputs_5km/

variables.name: chlorophyll_5km
variables.label: Chlorophyll-a Concentration (5km)
variables.description: Same as chl_outputs but resampled to a 5 km grid before extraction, for comparison against coarser global model outputs.

resources.name: Site coordinate list with time series (combined CSV)

variables.name: chlorophyll
variables.label: Chlorophyll-a Concentration
variables.description: Extracted chlorophyll-a value at this site and time.

variables.name: UniqueSite
variables.label: Site ID
variables.description: Unique site identifier joining to the per-site NetCDF files.

resources.name: CRW monthly composites
resources.path: KAUST - DATA/1st Project - Global model recorrection/crw_monthly_nc/

variables.name: sst_monthly
variables.label: Monthly SST composite
variables.description: NOAA Coral Reef Watch monthly SST composite.

resources.name: NOAA OI SST monthly mean and climatologies
resources.path: KAUST - DATA/1st Project - Global model recorrection/sst.mnmean.nc, sst.mon.ltm.1981-2010.nc, sst.mon.ltm.1991-2020.nc, sst.mon.ltm.nc

variables.name: sst
variables.label: Sea Surface Temperature
variables.description: NOAA Optimum Interpolation (OI) SST monthly mean and long-term climatology baselines (1981-2010 and 1991-2020).

resources.name: Net Primary Productivity outputs
resources.path: KAUST - DATA/1st Project - Global model recorrection/NPP/

access.how_to_request: Internal working data for an active model recalibration project — contact the project lead for access and current status.

provenance.originator: KAUST, derived from NASA MODIS/AQUA chlorophyll, NOAA Coral Reef Watch, and NOAA OI SST source products

known_issues: Site list is global, not Red-Sea-specific — most of the ~2,000 extraction sites (visible from filename coordinates) fall outside the Red Sea (Caribbean, Indo-Pacific, etc.); needs filtering to the Red Sea subset for basin-specific use.
No documentation file found describing the exact chlorophyll source product or extraction methodology — inferred from folder/file naming only.
